message:
🐛 Add cursor-pointer to all button elements (#10651, #10652) (#10656)

* 🐛 Add isDemoMode checks to workloads + data_residency handlers

7 handlers across 2 files were missing isDemoMode guards, violating
CLAUDE.md requirement that every data-returning endpoint check demo
mode. Added demo mode checks to:

workloads.go: ListWorkloads, GetWorkload, ResolveDependencies,
  MonitorWorkload, GetDeployStatus
data_residency.go: ListRules, ListRegions, ListClusterRegions,
  ListViolations, GetSummary

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

* 🐛 Add cursor-pointer to all button elements (#10651, #10652)

Tailwind's preflight resets <button> cursor to 'default'. Add global
base layer rule so all <button> and [role=button] elements show
pointer cursor. Also add cursor-pointer to shared Button component
for defense-in-depth.

Fixes both the login page button (#10651) and AI Missions clickable
elements (#10652) that use raw <button> tags.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
